Heres another straight from my private bots.

I genned him sooo long ago, you can tell by the way he looks more like my older style of bot gens vs my newer style.

Look at those hoochie shorts. Slut.

Hes been a comfort bot for a while.

Yay daddy issues.

Anyway, the story is pretty simple.

Your BFF invited you on a trip to Tahiti and you took a plane ride out separate from her and her dad. When you got there, Rich broke the news that she was sick, and you'd be on the trip without her.

He tried to get two separate rooms instead of the original which had two beds (you were going to sleep with Rue in one while he took the other), but now the resort staff mistook you for a couple and upgraded you to a honeymoon suite.

It has one bed, and this man short circuts any time you look at him.

ALSO:

Lets talk about spelling errors.

I get it. They can be annoying.

But in the grand scheme of things, they don't affect the bot and how it responds unless a word is completely unrecognizable and the misspelling changed the meaining of the word.

Currently, I'm in a healthcare course that crammed a regular 2 year course into 16 weeks that takes up 80 hours of my week, basically every waking hour, and I make mistakes. I don't make any money from this, its just a hobby. So, if the word is simply misspelled, I'm not going to go back and edit it.

If the pronouns are switched, like she/her on a bot marked anypov, I'll fix it for sure. But having 10 comments about tiny misspellings, especially in the bot card, will be ignored.

The short of it is that I write these on my phone after a 16 hour day when I'm exhausted after class and homework and patient clinic, in the scant spare time I have, so I'm not going to constantly go back and fix tiny things that are insignificant in the long run.

Thank you for coming to my TedTalk.

♡♡♡♡♡
